stage_1_classifier.reason: This was an exploratory discovery call where Bharat presented general AI agent use cases to Jacob, who is in early-stage R&D for a medical device. Jacob expressed interest in learning more but said 'Some of them might be a little ways out as far as the development process goes.' No specific demo was promised - Bharat only said 'Himanshu will send you a one pager one use case' and 'love to continue the conversation even if it is not a right now moment.' No follow-up meeting was scheduled, and the customer needs time to discuss internally first.
